mapper.select: select id, title, content_format, content, summary, status, visibility, delete_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from osh_doc where id = #{id} and delete_flag = 0
mapper.insert: insert into osh_doc ( id, title, content_format, content, summary, status, visibility, delete_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time ) values ( #{id}, #{title}, #{contentFormat}, #{content}, #{summary}, #{status}, #{visibility}, #{deleteFlag}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.update:
update osh_doc
title = #{title}, content = #{content}, content_format = #{contentFormat}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now(),
where id = #{id} and delete_flag = 0
mapper.select: select doc_id from osh_doc_ref where ref_type = 'course_section' and ref_id = #{sectionId} and is_primary = 1 and delete_flag = 0 order by create_time desc limit 1

select id, doc_id, ref_type, ref_id, is_primary, sort, anchor_type, anchor_start, anchor_end, excerpt_title, delete_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from osh_doc_ref where ref_type = 'course_section' and ref_id = #{sectionId} and is_primary = 1 and delete_flag = 0 order by create_time desc limit 1

select d.content from osh_doc_ref r inner join osh_doc d on d.id = r.doc_id and d.delete_flag = 0 where r.ref_type = 'course_section' and r.ref_id = #{sectionId} and r.is_primary = 1 and r.delete_flag = 0 order by r.create_time desc limit 1
mapper.delete: delete from osh_doc_ref where ref_type = 'course_section' and ref_id = #{sectionId} and delete_flag = 1
mapper.update: update osh_doc_ref set delete_flag = 1, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now() where ref_type = 'course_section' and ref_id = #{sectionId} and delete_flag = 0
mapper.insert: insert into osh_doc_ref ( id, doc_id, ref_type, ref_id, is_primary, sort, anchor_type, anchor_start, anchor_end, excerpt_title, delete_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time ) values ( #{id}, #{docId}, #{refType}, #{refId}, #{isPrimary}, #{sort}, #{anchorType}, #{anchorStart}, #{anchorEnd}, #{excerptTitle}, #{deleteFlag}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime} )
